remarks_html:
Acknowledge identifying yourself with BotNet.

Result:

  • 0x00: Failed
  • 0x01: Succeeded

For server revision 4, BotNet will always send 0x01.

Administrative access:

This field is only sent when the value has changed from the previous value. Since it should be assumed to have a value of 0 (no flags set), new connections from users with flags set will receive it when they first update their status.

More about Administrative access can be seen in the BotNet Protocol Overview.
